meta_description: Discover the 50 best thought leaders in insurance for 2026, including insurtech founders, global executives, consultants, podcast hosts, and innovation leaders.
alt_text: Best thought leaders in insurance 2026 featuring top industry experts and innovators
excerpt: The insurance industry is changing faster than at any point in its history. This guide profiles the 50 best thought leaders in insurance for 2026, spanning insurtech founders, global executives, consultants, podcast hosts, authors, and innovation leaders.
